OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: JPT Steven Derby; Clerk: K. Liu; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Florine Deyein is present. Represented by Patrick Boushell.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendants Cedrics Horne, Michelle Horne and Jaquita Horne all present.
Attorney Ruly Tafzil appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Steven Derby, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of April 27, 2015 is vacated. (D501)
